mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sp_daily_logs (user_id, log_date, calories, protein, fat, carbs, exercise_minutes) VALUES (#{userId}, #{logDate}, COALESCE(#{calories}, 0), COALESCE(#{protein}, 0), COALESCE(#{fat}, 0), COALESCE(#{carbs}, 0), COALESCE(#{exerciseMinutes}, 0)) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE calories = IF(#{calories} IS NULL, calories, #{calories}), protein = IF(#{protein} IS NULL, protein, #{protein}), fat = IF(#{fat} IS NULL, fat, #{fat}), carbs = IF(#{carbs} IS NULL, carbs, #{carbs}), exercise_minutes = IF(#{exerciseMinutes} IS NULL, exercise_minutes, #{exerciseMinutes})

INSERT INTO sp_daily_logs (user_id, log_date, calories, protein, fat, carbs, exercise_minutes) VALUES (#{userId}, #{logDate}, 0, 0, 0, 0, #{minutes}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE exercise_minutes = exercise_minutes + #{minutes}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(exercise_minutes), 0) FROM sp_daily_logs WHERE user_id = #{userId}
